title: Rule-Obj-FlowAction
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega flow action rule (Rule-Obj-FlowAction). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name — auto-derived from pyActionName.

pyActionName.description: Action name (PascalCase or camelCase, no spaces). Class key — the unique identifier within pyClassName.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label shown on the action button and dialog title.

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of the flow action's purpose.

pyClassName.description: The Pega work class this flow action belongs to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase').

pyUsedAs.description: How the flow action is invoked. LOCALACTION = action menu on assignments. LOCALANDCONNECTOR = also available as connector-level action in screen flows. CONNECTORACTION = flow connector only (not available as local action). Must be set explicitly — defaults to LOCALANDCONNECTOR if omitted.

pyViewReference.description: Name of the Rule-UI-View rendered inside the dialog. Required for Cosmos/Constellation apps (Pega 8.4+). Set this OR pySectionReference, not both.

pySectionReference.description: Name of the Rule-HTML-Section rendered inside the dialog. For traditional HTML UI only (pre-8.4). Set this OR pyViewReference, not both.

pySectionReferencePassParamPage.description: Pass the current parameter page to the referenced section. Must be 'true' for modern flow actions.

pyOldStreamType.description: UI type. 'Rule-HTML-Section' = reference section (standard for new flow actions). 'Rule-Obj-FlowAction' = legacy flow actions with inline UI (pre-section-reference era). 'NO_UI' = no UI. '' = reference HTML (deprecated). Validate auto-sets to 'NO_UI' when pySectionReference is empty.

pyRuleSet.description: Rule set the flow action is saved to.

pyRuleAvailable.description: Availability status. Use 'Yes' for custom flow actions. 'Final' = locked/read-only.

pyAuditActivity.description: Activity that writes an audit trail entry. Almost always 'Audit'.

pyClientValidation.description: Enable client-side validation before submit. true is standard.

pyNextAssignment.description: true to route automatically to the next assignment after submit.

pyNextAssignmentFlow.description: true to route to the next assignment using flow routing.

pyNextAssignmentCover.description: true to route to the next assignment in the cover case.

pyNextAssignmentWorkBasket.description: true to route the next assignment to a workbasket.

pyConfirmHarness.description: Harness displayed after the action completes. Usually 'Confirm'.

pyconfirmchoice.description: Display mode after submit. 'ShowHarness' = display confirmation harness. 'GetNextWork' = get next work item. 'GetNextWorkInCurrentWorkPool' = get next work in current work pool. 'AutoClose' = close the work object. Note lowercase 'c' in field name.

pyContainerType.description: Layout container type for the dialog. NOHEADER is standard.

pyPreProcessingActivity.description: Activity to run before displaying the form. Blank = no pre-activity.

pyPreProcessingTransformRule.description: Data Transform applied before the form is shown. Blank = none.

pyLocalActionActivity.description: Post-processing activity — runs after submit and after pyActionTransformRule. Use this for post-submit logic like calling services or setting routing. Blank = none.

pyActionTransformRule.description: Post-processing Data Transform — the primary DT that runs after the user submits the form (after validation, before pyLocalActionActivity). This is the correct field for post-submit data transforms. Do NOT use pyAdditionalSubmitFieldsDataTransform for this purpose. Blank = none.

pxFARefreshSettingsOfView.description: Field-change refresh settings. Each entry maps a property change to a Data Transform that runs while the user is still on the form (live preview pattern).

pyPropertyName.description: Property whose change triggers the refresh, e.g. .Location or .GameDate. Cannot be blank.

pyDataTransform.description: Data Transform to run when the property changes. Cannot be blank.

pyDataTransformCallParams.description: Optional parameters passed to the data transform.

pyValidateActivity.description: Validate rule to run when the form is submitted. Blank = no validation. Required when pyUpdateStatus is true.

pyAuditWhenName.description: When rule that controls whether to audit. Blank = always audit.

pyUpdateStatus.description: When true, the work status is updated when this action is submitted. Requires pyProposedStatus and pyValidateActivity.

pyProposedStatus.description: New status to set on the work object when pyUpdateStatus is true. Must be a valid pyStatusWork FieldValue.

pyDisqualifyAction.description: When true, the flow action is hidden from the user (disqualified).

pyReloadForm.description: When true, the form is reloaded after the action completes. Rarely used.

pyShowFAButtons.description: Show standard flow action navigation buttons (Submit/Cancel/Next/Previous). false = buttons handled by the Section/View.

pySubmitLabel.description: Label for the Submit button (when pyShowFAButtons = true).

pyNextLabel.description: Label for the Next button (screen flows).

pyPreviousLabel.description: Label for the Previous button (screen flows).

pySaveButtonVisibility.description: When the Save button is shown. 'Always' = always visible. 'Never' = hidden. 'When' = conditional (use pyWhenToSkipSaveButton to name the when rule).

pyWhenToSkipSaveButton.description: When rule name that controls when to hide the Save button.

pyActionInstructions.description: Free-text instructions displayed to the user inside the dialog.

pyActionInstructionsCaption.description: Caption heading for the instructions block.

pyCategory.description: Category grouping for the action (usually blank).

pyCategoryDisplayName.description: Display name of the category. 'None' when pyCategory is blank.

pyMemo.description: Developer change memo saved with the rule.

pyUsage.description: Usage notes (usually blank for custom actions).

pySystemAction.description: true marks this as a system-generated action.

pyEditable.description: (rare) true when the flow action form is editable at runtime.

pyBulkOnlyAction.description: Restricts this action to bulk execution only.

pyBulkPreProcessingDataTransform.description: (rare) Data Transform applied before each case in bulk execution.

pyBulkPreProcessingDataTransformParams.description: (rare) Parameters passed to the bulk pre-processing data transform.

pyAuditActivityParams.description: (rare) Parameters passed to the audit activity.

pyActionWhensList.description: When rules that guard availability of this action.

pyActionPrivilegeList.description: Privileges required to invoke this action.

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Named pages used by this action.

pyDefaultButton.description: Default action button configuration. Usually left empty for new custom actions.

pyHTMLVersion.description: HTML version number. Must be '1' for modern JSP code generation.

pyAutoHTML.description: Tells Pega to auto-generate the HTML stream. Must be 'true' for modern JSP code generation.

pyHTMLReference.description: Leave blank at create time. Auto-managed by pzAssemblePreProcess.

pyStreamName.description: Auto-set to pyActionName by pzAssemblePreProcess. Can be omitted.

pyJavaGenerateAPIVersion.description: Java code generation API version. '04-02' for current FlowAction rules. Controls whether pzAssemblePreProcess emits modern <%...%> JSP syntax (04-02) or legacy {%...%} syntax (03-02 or absent).

pyClientRuntimeVersion.description: Client runtime version. '05-03' for current FlowAction rules. Required for modern JSP code generation with offline template support and inspector integration.

pyCircumstanceProp.description: Property used for circumstancing. Blank for no circumstancing.

pyDeleteMemo.description: (rare) Memo recorded when the rule is deleted.

pyCheckInRuleSet.description: (rare) Rule set name for check-in operations.

pyTaskGroup.description: (rare) Task group identifier for project management.

pyPageName.description: (rare) Clipboard page name for the flow action context.

pyAccessibilityCount.description: Number of accessibility features enabled (string-encoded number).

pyHelpType.description: Type of help content. '' = reference HTML. 'DEFINE' = define help inline.

pyIsUsingDesignTemplate.description: Whether the flow action uses a design template layout. 'true' enables the default 1-column design template.

pyDesignTemplateName.description: Design template name. 'pzDesignTemplate1Column' is the standard default.

pyAllowRuntimeEdit.description: Allow runtime editing of the form layout.

pyRegions.description: (rare) Named regions defined by the design template.

pyPreAutomationList.description: (rare) Automation steps to run before the main action.

pyPostAutomationList.description: (rare) Automation steps to run after the main action.

pySavableDataPageList.description: (rare) Data pages to save when the flow action is submitted.

pySections.description: Embedded section layout — auto-managed by pzAssemblePreProcess. Do not author directly. Always exactly 1 element. The structure wraps a single Embed-Harness-Section whose pySectionBody references the section rule named in pySectionReference or pyViewReference. When reading a flow action, the meaningful 'signal' fields are pyPromptClass, pyPageContext, and pySectionBody[].pyInclude; the rest is boilerplate defaults.

pyValueChanged.description: String-encoded boolean tracking value changes. Auto-managed.

pySectionReferencePage.description: Top-level mirror of pySections[0].pySectionBody[0].pyUsingPage. When pyPageContext is 'clipboard' or 'datapage', this holds the same clipboard page name as the sectionBody-level pyUsingPage. Empty when pyPageContext is 'none'. Auto-managed — set via the UI editor, not authored directly.

pySectionReferenceParams.description: (rare) Parameters passed to the referenced section.

pyWindowTitle.description: (rare) Browser window title when action opens in new window.

pyCompact.description: Compact rendering mode. Must be 'true' for modern JSP code generation.

pySortDateCircumWithinRSMajor.description: Internal sort flag for circumstance resolution.

pySourceStream.description: Auto-generated JSP/HTML stream. Never author manually.

then.x-pega-condition: pyViewReference is non-empty — Cosmos/Constellation mode, pySectionReference must be blank
pySectionReference is non-empty — traditional HTML mode, pyViewReference must be blank
pyNextAssignment is false or empty — routing sub-fields must be blank

pyParametersParamType.description: Data type. UI dropdown offers STRING, BOOLEAN, INTEGER only. Other values observed in real rules.

pyParametersParamReq.description: Required: '0' or 'N' = optional, '-1' or 'Y' = required, '' = unspecified.

pyWhenName.description: Name of the When rule that guards this action's availability. Blank = no guard.

pyPrivilegeName.description: Name of the Privilege rule required to invoke this action.

HarnessButton.description: Default button configuration (Embed-Harness-Button). Usually left empty.

pyNoFormSubmit.description: Suppress form submission on click. String, not Boolean ('true'/'false').

pyWindowWidth.description: Modal window width. String, not Number.

pyWindowHeight.description: Modal window height. String, not Number.

pyActionComplete.description: Action to run after button action completes.

pyUseExistingFrame.description: true to reuse an existing frame.

pyPassCurrentParameterPage.description: true to pass the current parameter page to the button action.

pyLocalAction.description: Local action to invoke from the button.

pyActionParams.description: Parameters passed to the button action.

pyWhenNotPrivilege.description: When condition evaluated when the user lacks the required privilege.

HarnessSection.description: A section layout container (Embed-Harness-Section). Auto-managed by pzAssemblePreProcess. In flow actions, always exactly 1 element in pySections. The only fields that carry application-specific meaning are pyPromptClass, pyPageContext, and the pySectionBody[].pyInclude reference; the rest are layout defaults.

pyContainerType.description: Container type. Always NOHEADER for flow actions.

pyContainerFormat.description: Container format. Valid values from pyContainerFormat prompt list on Embed-Display-Table-Cell.

pyPromptClass.description: The Pega class the section applies to. Always mirrors pyClassName of the parent flow action.

pyPageContext.description: Page context for the section. 'none' = use the current work object. 'clipboard' or 'datapage' = resolve the section against the page named in pySectionBody[].pyUsingPage. 'property' = resolve against a property reference (rare, not observed in sample). Usually 'none'.

pyExpandable.description: Whether the section is expandable/collapsible. Usually 'false'.

pyExpanded.description: Whether the section is initially expanded. Usually 'true'.

pyFloatLayout.description: Float direction. Always 'None' for flow actions.

pyLoadDeferred.description: Defer loading of the section. Usually 'false'.

pyHeaderTable.description: Header layout table. Always a fixed 1x1 FREEFORM table with a single read-only cell (pyHeight 13, pyWidth 100). Auto-managed.

pySectionBody.description: Section body elements. Always exactly 1 element in flow actions.

pyStandardHeaderElements.description: Standard header element defaults. Always 1 element with pyVisible=ALWAYS, all others empty.

pyRefreshPreDataTransform.description: Pre-refresh data transform. Auto-managed, always empty.

pyDeferLoadRetrievalActivityParams.description: Parameters for deferred load activity. Placeholder only.

HarnessSectionBody.description: A section body element (Embed-Harness-SectionBody). Contains the reference to the included section rule and the body layout table. In flow actions, pyBodyType is always INCLUDE and pyInclude holds the referenced section name.

pyBodyType.description: Body type. Always 'INCLUDE' for flow actions — the body references another section by name.

pyInclude.description: Name of the included section rule (Rule-HTML-Section or Rule-UI-View). This is the key 'signal' field — it names the section rendered in the flow action dialog. May be empty when pyViewReference on the parent flow action is used instead.

pyUsingPage.description: Clipboard page context for the included section. Usually empty; set when the section needs a specific page (e.g. 'pyAttachmentPage', 'TempChannelPage').

pyPassCurrentParameterPage.description: Pass the current parameter page to the included section. Usually 'true' in modern rules.

pyAllowRowUpdate.description: Allow row updates in repeating layouts. Always 'true'.

pyDisplayWhen.description: When condition for displaying the section body.

pyPreActivity.description: Activity to run before rendering the body. Usually empty.

pyRefreshWhen.description: When condition for refreshing the section body.

pyRDLPageSize.description: Repeating dynamic layout page size. Default '10'.

pyRDName.description: Report definition name (for data-bound layouts). Usually empty.

pyDPName.description: Data page name (for data-bound layouts). Usually empty.

pyDPResultsClass.description: Results class for the data page. Usually empty.

pyPageListProperty.description: Page list property (for repeating layouts). Usually empty.

pyPageListPropertyClass.description: Class of the page list property. Usually empty.

pyIncludedRuleXML.description: Embedded section XML. Usually a stub ({pxObjClass: 'Rule-HTML-Section'} with no content). In rare cases contains a full embedded Rule-HTML-Section with its own recursive pySections — maximum observed nesting depth is 2 levels. Auto-managed.

pyTable.description: Body layout table. Modern rules use SIMPLELAYOUT (1 column, 1 row). Legacy rules (pre-8.4) use TEMPLATE or DOUBLE layouts with multiple columns (LABEL/FIELD/SEPARATOR pattern). Auto-managed.

pySectionBodyElements.description: Body element defaults. Always 1 element of class Embed-Harness-HeaderElements with all fields empty.

pySectionParams.description: Parameters passed to the included section. Usually contains only pxObjClass='' and pyTempPlaceHolder='TempPlaceHolder'.

pyPreDataTransform.description: Pre-render data transform. Auto-managed, always empty.

pyDCPreDataTransform.description: Data context pre-data transform. Auto-managed, always empty.

DisplayTable.description: A layout table (Embed-Display-Table). Used for both pyHeaderTable (FREEFORM, 1x1, read-only) and pyTable (SIMPLELAYOUT, 1x1 in modern rules). Contains rows of cells that define the grid layout. Auto-managed by the UI editor.

pyColumnCount.description: Number of columns. '1' for modern rules; up to '5' in legacy TEMPLATE layouts.

pyLayoutFormat.description: Layout format. CUSTOM for pyHeaderTable, empty for modern pyTable, DOUBLE for legacy.

pyLayoutFormatType.description: Layout format type. FREEFORM for pyHeaderTable, SIMPLELAYOUT for modern pyTable body, TEMPLATE for legacy.

pyLayoutOtherFormat.description: Custom layout format name. Always empty.

pyUnitHeight.description: CSS unit for height. Present in pyTable but not pyHeaderTable in legacy rules.

pyColumnDefaults.description: Default settings per column (Embed-Display-Table-Restricted). Present in pyTable only. 1 element for modern SIMPLELAYOUT, N elements matching pyColumnCount for legacy TEMPLATE layouts.

pyRestrictedType.description: Column restricted type. NONE for modern; LABEL/FIELD/SEPARATOR for legacy TEMPLATE layouts.

pyRows.description: Table rows. Usually 1 row for modern rules.

DisplayTableRow.description: A table row (Embed-Display-Table-Row). Contains cells that hold field/label/section references.

pyRowDefaults.description: Default settings for cells in this row (Embed-Display-Table-Restricted). Present in pyTable rows, not pyHeaderTable rows.

DisplayTableCell.description: A table cell (Embed-Display-Table-Cell). Header cells (in pyHeaderTable) are read-only with pyHeight=13, pyWidth=100. Body cells (in pyTable) have pyHeight=22, pyWidth=130 and include additional RDL fields (categorize, filter, sort). In legacy TEMPLATE layouts, pyType indicates the cell role (LABEL, FIELD, SEPARATOR, SUB_SECTION).

pyType.description: Cell type. Empty for modern SIMPLELAYOUT. Legacy TEMPLATE uses LABEL/FIELD/SEPARATOR to define the column role.

pyValue.description: Cell value. Empty for most cells. SUB_SECTION cells hold the section rule name.

pyHeight.description: Cell height in pyUnit. '13' for header cells, '22' for body cells.

pyWidth.description: Cell width in pyUnit. '100' for header cells, '130' for body cells.

pyReadOnly.description: 'true' for header cells, empty for body cells.

pyWrap.description: 'false' for header cells, 'true' for body cells.

pyRestricted.description: 'false' for modern rules. 'true' in legacy TEMPLATE FIELD/SEPARATOR cells.

pyIncludeLabel.description: Include a label with the cell. Usually 'false'.

pyEditOptions.description: Edit options. 'Auto' in legacy, empty in modern.

pyColumnFiltering.description: Enable column filtering. Body cells only. Usually 'true'.

pyColumnSorting.description: Enable column sorting. Body cells only. Usually 'true'.

pyColumnCategorize.description: Enable column categorization. Body cells only. Usually 'false'.

pyCategorizeSortType.description: Sort direction for categorization. Body cells only. Default 'ASC'.

pyShowFilterUIBy.description: Filter UI type. 'value' for modern, 'format' for legacy.

pyReadOnlyStyle.description: CSS class for read-only mode. Legacy may have 'dataLabelRead RL2'.

pyReadWriteStyle.description: CSS class for read-write mode. Legacy may have 'dataLabelWrite RL2'.

pyUserData.description: Visibility and conditions for the cell. Class is Embed-Harness-HeaderElements (most cells) or Embed-Harness-UserData (legacy LABEL/SEPARATOR). Header cells have pyVisible=ALWAYS; body cells have pyVisible='' (empty).

pyModes.description: Control modes. Header cells have 1 element; body cells have 2 (second adds pyHelperTextType='none').

pyPreDataTransform.description: Pre-render data transform for the cell. Auto-managed.
